case_title: ERIC CARMICHAEL VS. JAMES SOTO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARMICHAEL, ERIC D.B.A. RECOVERY SOLUTIONS AS TO DEFENDANT SOTO, JAMES DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-2012
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARMICHAEL, ERIC D.B.A. RECOVERY SOLUTIONS

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARMICHAEL, ERIC D.B.A. RECOVERY SOLUTIONS HEARING SET FOR MAY-30-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-30-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ERIC CARMICHAEL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
